 #live_trading_runtime.py
 from __future__ import annotations
+"""
+live_trading_runtime.py - Phase 13 live streamer for Layer-2
+
+Tails a growing OHLCV CSV, computes L1 features, scores with your model
+(with optional local calibrator), runs the L2 transition engine to
+produce OPEN/FLIP/CLOSE events, and routes signals to Discord/webhooks/console.
+
+Now with:
+- --csv_tz to interpret CSV timestamps
+- --reset_state to ignore persisted last_ts
+- --trace to print concise per-bar decisions (HOLD/OPEN/FLIP/CLOSE, gates, confidences, R, age)
+- --status_line for a single continuously updating console line (HOLD/BUY/SELL/CLOSE + stats)
+- Discord publish gating: --publish_min_grade (C/B+/A+), --publish_side (all/long-only/short-only), --cooldown_bars
+- Gating knobs (VWAP/EMA/TOD + gate_mode) and dynamic probability thresholds
+- PRESET integration from bot.config: --preset applies p_buy/p_sell, session_tz, instrument,
+  trade window, and aligns publish_min_grade to allowed_grades for consistent proba -> grade -> publish behavior.
+
+Fixes vs previous:
+- Avoid double-calibration if model is already CalibratedClassifierCV
+- Match L1 feature filtering & sanitation to ensure proba matches backtests 1:1
+- Exact L1-style imputation (ffill â†’ bfill â†’ fillna(0.0))
+- Separate RTH session (feature day structure) from trade window used for TOD gating
+"""
 
 import argparse
 import subprocess

+    def _resolve_canonical_position(
+        self,
+        *,
+        pos_qty: Any,
+        side: Any = None,
+        source: str = "unknown",
+    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
+        qty = _safe_float(pos_qty)
+        if qty is None or not np.isfinite(qty):
+            qty = 0.0
+        side_norm = str(side or "").strip().upper()
+        if abs(float(qty)) <= 1e-6:
+            return {"signed_pos": 0, "canonical_side": "FLAT", "raw_qty": qty, "mismatch": False}
+        qty_sign = 1 if float(qty) > 0 else -1
+        if side_norm in {"LONG", "SHORT"}:
+            side_sign = 1 if side_norm == "LONG" else -1
+            mismatch = side_sign != qty_sign
+            if mismatch:
+                try:
+                    seen = getattr(self, "_canonical_position_mismatch_seen", set())
+                    key = (str(source), float(qty), side_norm)
+                    if key not in seen:
+                        seen.add(key)
+                        self._canonical_position_mismatch_seen = seen
+                        self._log_exec_event(
+                            {
+                                "event": "position_side_qty_mismatch_canonicalized",
+                                "source": source,
+                                "pos_qty": float(qty),
+                                "side": side_norm,
+                                "signed_pos": side_sign,
+                            }
+                        )
+                except Exception:
+                    pass
+            return {
+                "signed_pos": side_sign,
+                "canonical_side": side_norm,
+                "raw_qty": qty,
+                "mismatch": mismatch,
+            }
+        canonical_side = "LONG" if qty_sign > 0 else "SHORT"
+        return {
+            "signed_pos": qty_sign,
+            "canonical_side": canonical_side,
+            "raw_qty": qty,
+            "mismatch": False,
+        }
+

-    def _advance_bar_recovery_ladder(self, *, ingress_cause: str, detail: Mapping[str, Any]) -> None:

-                result = "ok"

-                action = "soft_resync_stage2"

         if msg_type == "HIST_BEGIN":

             self._fiber_hist_complete = False
